description: Style Note Carry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil.  Product Details Black leather wallet with three-folds Has two main compartments Has six card slots, five insert pockets, an id card holder, a zipped pocket and one buttoned pocket on the right to carry coins Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 12 cm x 9 cm
